description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and several mature trees. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white and gray exterior, with large windows providing ample natural light. The front includes a covered porch area and a wide driveway leading up to the main entrance. The backyard is landscaped with a pool and patio, offering outdoor living space and privacy. The house also includes a detached or semi-detached garage structure visible from the side and rear. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with large windows, a landscaped yard, and a pool, surrounded by hedges and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and part of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and extensive greenery for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and the flat roof's expanse.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, a wide door, and minimalistic design elements.
